title: Will Program Headwinds Hurt Leidos' (LDOS) Q1 Earnings?
text: Leidos Holdings (LDOS) first-quarter results are likely to benefit from the ramp-up in contracts and impressive awards, partially offset by some program headwinds.

title: Leidos Announces New San Diego Campus Point Facility
text: RESTON, Va. , April 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Leidos (NYSE:LDOS), a FORTUNE® 500 science and technology leader, held its groundbreaking ceremony recently to mark the start of construction for its new facility at the Campus Point location in San Diego, California.

title: Leidos Schedules First Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call for May 3, 2022 at 8 a.m. (ET)
text: RESTON, Va. , April 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Leidos (NYSE: LDOS), a FORTUNE 500® science and technology leader, has scheduled a conference call for Tuesday, May 3, 2022, at 8 a.m.
